chunks.title: Trump's Deportation Plan
chunks.summary: The Trump Administration has launched a large-scale deportation program, with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) as the main agency. The goal is to deport millions of undocumented immigrants, with a target of 3,000 arrests per day.
questions: How many undocumented immigrants are targeted for deportation?
What is the goal of the Trump Administration's deportation program?

chunks.title: Shift in Immigration Enforcement Tactics
chunks.summary: The Trump Administration has shifted its immigration enforcement tactics from targeted approaches to mass arrests, with a focus on concealing identities and using force.
questions: What are the new tactics used by the Trump Administration for immigration enforcement?
How do immigration agents conceal their identities?
What is the role of face coverings in immigration enforcement?

chunks.title: Immigration Enforcement Tactics Shift
chunks.summary: The Trump administration has shifted its immigration enforcement tactics from targeted approaches to mass arrests, with a focus on concealing identities and using force. This shift has led to increased presence of federal agents in hospitals and immigration courthouses, making the situation more dangerous for both agents and individuals.
questions: What are the new immigration enforcement tactics used by the Trump administration?
How have the tactics changed from the previous administration?
What are the risks associated with the new tactics?

chunks.title: Immigration Enforcement Tactics Shift
chunks.summary: The Trump administration has shifted its immigration enforcement tactics from targeted approaches to mass arrests, using force and concealing identities, leading to increased presence of federal agents in hospitals and immigration courthouses.
questions: What are the new immigration enforcement tactics used by the Trump administration?
What are the dangers of deploying tear gas in civilian settings?
What are the Trump administration's new immigration enforcement tactics?
How have these tactics affected hospitals and immigration courthouses?
How has the presence of federal agents in hospitals and immigration courthouses increased?
What is the $75 billion package approved for the agency over the next four years?
